root.name: Add text box with specified text below chart on Slide 3
root.description: Evaluates whether a text box with the exact text 'Data shows increasing trend since 1980' has been added below the chart on slide 3, and whether the position and visibility are appropriate. Penalizes extraneous or incorrect modifications.

children.name: Addition of correct text box on Slide 3
children.description: Checks that a new text box with the exact required text has been added to slide 3.

children.name: Position of the text box: below the chart
children.description: Checks that the new text box is positioned below the chart on slide 3.

children.name: No extraneous changes to other slides or content
children.description: Checks that no slides other than slide 3, and no elements except the new text box, were modified, added, or removed.

children.name: Text box is clearly visible and not overlapping other objects
children.description: Checks that the text box is not obscured by or overlapping the chart or other major objects, and is clearly visible.

metadata.task: Slide 3: Add a text box with the text 'Data shows increasing trend since 1980' below the chart
